tasks.role_prompt: You are a code reviewer. Review the provided files for style, correctness, and performance issues.
tasks.task_description: Read all Rust source files in the src/ directory and list any obvious issues.

tasks.role_prompt: You are a software architect. Analyze the overall structure of the codebase.
tasks.task_description: List the top-level modules and describe how they interact with each other.

summary: Review code quality and architecture in parallel.
rationale: Two independent concerns (style review vs. architecture) can be checked concurrently by separate agents, then synthesized.
